title: Add help text to all takt subcommands and flags
description: The top-level 'takt --help' has good one-line descriptions for each command, but all subcommands and their flags are missing help text. Update build_parser() in src/agent_takt/cli.py to add: (1) help= strings on all positional arguments (spec_file, bead_id, etc.); (2) help= strings on all optional flags across every subcommand (plan, run, bead, handoff, retry, merge, summary, tui, telemetry, init); (3) help= strings on all bead sub-subcommand flags (create, show, update, delete, list, claims, graph). Match the tone and style of the existing top-level command descriptions. Do not change any behaviour — only argparse help strings.
acceptance_criteria: takt <subcommand> --help shows a description for every argument and flag, matching the style of takt --help
